Class Transaction

java.lang.Object
com.bank.core.domain.model.Transaction
public class Transaction extends Object
Core domain entity representing a completed or failed fund transfer between two accounts.

A Transaction is an immutable ledger record created at the moment a transfer is attempted. The TransactionStatus captures the outcome, and any failure reason is stored in the failureReason field for audit purposes.

Like Account, this class is a pure domain object with no framework dependencies. All persistence concerns are handled in the infrastructure layer.

Since:
1.0.0
Version:
1.0.0
Author:
Core Banking Team

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final Money
    amount
    The amount transferred, expressed in the common currency of both accounts.
    private final Instant
    createdAt
    The moment at which this transaction was recorded.
    private final UUID
    destinationAccountId
    The destination (credit) account.
    private final String
    failureReason
    Human-readable description of why the transfer failed.
    private final UUID
    id
    Unique surrogate identifier for this transaction.
    private final String
    idempotencyKey
    The idempotency key supplied by the caller for this transfer request.
    private final UUID
    sourceAccountId
    The source (debit) account.
    private final TransactionStatus
    status
    The outcome of this transfer attempt.

  • Field Details

    • id

      private final UUID id
      Unique surrogate identifier for this transaction.

    • idempotencyKey

      private final String idempotencyKey
      The idempotency key supplied by the caller for this transfer request. Stored to enable duplicate detection and replay responses.

    • sourceAccountId

      private final UUID sourceAccountId
      The source (debit) account.

    • destinationAccountId

      private final UUID destinationAccountId
      The destination (credit) account.

    • amount

      private final Money amount
      The amount transferred, expressed in the common currency of both accounts.

    • status

      private final TransactionStatus status
      The outcome of this transfer attempt.

    • failureReason

      private final String failureReason
      Human-readable description of why the transfer failed. null when status is TransactionStatus.COMPLETED.

    • createdAt

      private final Instant createdAt
      The moment at which this transaction was recorded.

  • Constructor Details

    • Transaction

      public Transaction(UUID id, String idempotencyKey, UUID sourceAccountId, UUID destinationAccountId, Money amount, TransactionStatus status, String failureReason, Instant createdAt)
      Full constructor for reconstituting a Transaction from storage.
      Parameters:
      id - the transaction UUID
      idempotencyKey - the caller-supplied idempotency key
      sourceAccountId - the debit account UUID
      destinationAccountId - the credit account UUID
      amount - the transfer amount
      status - the transaction outcome
      failureReason - the failure description, or null on success
      createdAt - the creation timestamp

  • Method Details

    • completed

      public static Transaction completed(String idempotencyKey, UUID sourceAccountId, UUID destinationAccountId, Money amount)
      Factory method for recording a successful transfer.
      Parameters:
      idempotencyKey - the caller-supplied idempotency key
      sourceAccountId - the debit account UUID
      destinationAccountId - the credit account UUID
      amount - the transfer amount
      Returns:
      a new Transaction with status TransactionStatus.COMPLETED

    • failed

      public static Transaction failed(String idempotencyKey, UUID sourceAccountId, UUID destinationAccountId, Money amount, String reason)
      Factory method for recording a failed transfer.
      Parameters:
      idempotencyKey - the caller-supplied idempotency key
      sourceAccountId - the debit account UUID
      destinationAccountId - the credit account UUID
      amount - the transfer amount
      reason - a human-readable failure description
      Returns:
      a new Transaction with status TransactionStatus.FAILED

    • getId

      public UUID getId()
      Returns the transaction identifier.
      Returns:
      the transaction UUID

    • getIdempotencyKey

      public String getIdempotencyKey()
      Returns the caller-supplied idempotency key.
      Returns:
      the idempotency key string

    • getSourceAccountId

      public UUID getSourceAccountId()
      Returns the source (debit) account identifier.
      Returns:
      the source account UUID

    • getDestinationAccountId

      public UUID getDestinationAccountId()
      Returns the destination (credit) account identifier.
      Returns:
      the destination account UUID

    • getAmount

      public Money getAmount()
      Returns the transfer amount.
      Returns:
      the Money amount

    • getStatus

      public TransactionStatus getStatus()
      Returns the transaction outcome.
      Returns:
      the TransactionStatus

    • getFailureReason

      public String getFailureReason()
      Returns the failure reason, if any.
      Returns:
      the failure reason string, or null for completed transactions

    • getCreatedAt

      public Instant getCreatedAt()
      Returns the transaction creation timestamp.
      Returns:
      the creation Instant
